description: Benchmark after 4 quality gate fixes: best-of-5 concreteness, expanded placeholder detection, contract-guided synthesis default, broadened structural detection (thresholds + rollback). Apples-to-apples comparison with previous 2/5 baseline.
fixes_under_test: Best-of-5 lines for concreteness scoring -- aragora/debate/repo_grounding.py
Expanded placeholder detection (as needed, TBD, etc.) -- aragora/debate/repo_grounding.py
Broadened _has_quantitative_thresholds() -- qualitative patterns like 'must pass', 'no regressions'

command_template.task: Improve the aragora debate output quality gate: add expanded placeholder detection patterns for LLM hedging phrases like 'as needed' and 'to be determined', and score actionability of first 5 task lines instead of just the first line. Include ranked high-level tasks, suggested subtasks, owner modules/file paths, test plan, rollback plan, and explicit gate criteria.

runs.failure_mode: Duplicate and empty sections after upgrade loops

hard_defects: Gate Criteria is missing explicit quantitative thresholds.
soft_defects: Owner module / file paths are weakly grounded to existing repo files.
runs.failure_mode: Empty Test Plan + gate criteria lacks thresholds even after broadened detection

hard_defects: Gate Criteria is missing explicit quantitative thresholds.
soft_defects: Owner module / file paths are weakly grounded to existing repo files.
runs.failure_mode: Gate criteria still lacks quantitative thresholds in some LLM outputs

failure_mode_shift.before: 3/3 failures: all on 'Gate Criteria missing thresholds' (primary), plus rollback + paths in 2/3
failure_mode_shift.after: 3/3 failures: 2/3 on 'Gate Criteria missing thresholds', 1/3 on duplicate/empty sections, 0/3 on rollback alone
failure_mode_shift.rollback_detection_improvement: Rollback Plan is NO LONGER a standalone failure cause. The broadened detection (back out, cherry-pick, hotfix, stable build) resolved 100% of rollback-only failures from the baseline.
failure_mode_shift.threshold_detection_partial: Gate criteria threshold detection improved but still fails in ~60% of runs. LLM output contains language like 'all tests must pass' but the upgrade loops don't always produce >= 2 quantitative signals.
failure_mode_shift.new_failure_mode: Duplicate/empty sections appeared in 1/3 failures (not seen in baseline). Likely caused by upgrade loop introducing duplicate headings.

diagnostic_notes.initial_4_agent_test: First 5 runs used 4 agents (anthropic-api,openai-api,gemini,grok) with shorter task prompt. All 4 non-timeout runs scored identically 7.27/3.45 with 3 hard defects each. Task prompt was too simple to produce rich output.
diagnostic_notes.apples_to_apples_rerun: Reruns used identical task and 2-agent config as previous 2/5 baseline for fair comparison.
diagnostic_notes.key_insight: Structural fixes improved quality scores (+0.72 mean) and eliminated rollback as a failure mode. The binding constraint is now the LLM's tendency to produce qualitative-only gate criteria (no numeric thresholds) in ~60% of runs, plus occasional duplicate/empty sections from upgrade loops.
